items.md: Facilitated all **Scrum ceremonies** including Sprint Planning, Daily Standups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives for **cross-functional Agile teams of 7–10 members**

items.md: Improved **team velocity by 20–30%** through backlog refinement, improved sprint planning, and better story estimation.

items.md:
* Facilitated all **Scrum ceremonies** including Sprint Planning, Daily Standups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives for **cross-functional Agile teams of 7–10 members**
* Coached development teams and stakeholders on **Agile principles and Scrum framework**, improving team maturity and collaboration
* Provided timely status reports to the stakeholders, including sprint scope, issues, risks, mitigation plan and upcoming activities
* Led **Agile transformation initiatives**, helping teams transition from Waterfall to Scrum delivery models
* Promoted **self-organizing teams** by empowering team members to take ownership of sprint goals and deliverables.
* Improved **team velocity by 20–30%** through backlog refinement, improved sprint planning, and better story estimation.
* Trained the cross-functional team to use JIRA for keeping a track of the tasks and generate work progress graphs.

**Ernst & Young LLP** **Designation: Scrum Master (Aug 2022 – Apr 2025)** **Roles and Responsibilities** * Facilitated all **Scrum ceremonies** including Sprint Planning, Daily Standups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives for **cross-functional Agile teams of 7–10 members** * Coached development teams and stakeholders on **Agile principles and Scrum framework**, improving team maturity and collaboration * Provided timely status reports to the stakeholders, including sprint scope, issues, risks, mitigation plan and upcoming activities * Led **Agile transformation initiatives**, helping teams transition from Waterfall to Scrum delivery models * Promoted **self-organizing teams** by empowering team members to take ownership of sprint goals and deliverables. * Improved **team velocity by 20–30%** through backlog refinement, improved sprint planning, and better story estimation. * Trained the cross-functional team to use JIRA for keeping a track of the tasks and generate work progress graphs. **INFOSYS HYD** **Designation: Scrum Master (Sep 2020- Aug 2022)** * Facilitated various scrum ceremonies like sprint planning meetings, daily scrum, sprint review, product backlog refinement meetings and sprint retrospective meetings. --- * Participated in Backlog Refinement meeting along with the product owner in prioritizing at higher level to ensure that the product backlog meets the DEEP criteria and moving the user stories to sprint backlog which ensured the Definition of Ready (Acceptance criteria). * Getting ready for each sprint and release planning meeting by working with the team to break down feature stories into small deliverable User Stories that are appropriately sized for each sprint. # INFOSYS HYD **Designation: Manual Tester (May 2017 – Sep 2020)** Roles and Responsibilities: * Created detailed test cases based on business requirements and functional specifications. * Performed functional, regression, smoke, and UI testing on web and mobile applications. * Identified, documented, and tracked bugs using JIRA, and collaborated with developers to resolve them. * Participated in daily stand-up meetings as part of the Agile team. * Maintained traceability matrices and ensured comprehensive test coverage. # INFOSYS HYD **Designation: Software Intern (Dec 2016 – May 2017)** * Assisted in manual testing of a CRM application. * Reported bugs and inconsistencies in test environments. * Supported senior testers in creating reusable test cases and documentation # UDS Hyderabad **Designation: Technical specialist (Sep 2012 – Oct 2016)** * Managed and resolved technical issues related to internet protocols, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal performance. * Provided expert support for cable and phone services, assisting customers with installations, configurations, and troubleshooting. * Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement new technologies and improve existing systems. * Documented technical procedures and created user guides to enhance knowledge sharing and customer education. ## WORK EXPERIENCE: -
